title: padus obovata
intro: Padus obovata, also known as the May bush or dogwood, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, with its bark, leaves, and flowers used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Padus obovata include reducing inflammation, relieving fever, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
